stories.title: Jordan Walker is your 2026 Home Run Derby champion...
stories.summary: We have your one-stop shop for the most power-packed day of the baseball year as the 2026 Derby champion is crowned.

stories.title: Walker walks it off: Cards slugger wins HR Derby
stories.summary: Jordan Walker homered on his last six swings to beat hometown favorite Kyle Schwarber, becoming the first Cardinal to win the Home Run Derby.

stories.title: Jazz's Alexander exits Vegas game on stretcher
stories.summary: Jazz guard Trey Alexander was taken from the court on a stretcher Monday night after appearing to injure his side on a drive to the basket in an NBA summer league game against the Bulls.

stories.title: Balogun joins LeBron's agency after breakout WC
stories.summary: United States forward Folarin Balogun has signed with LeBron James' agency Klutch Sports following a breakout World Cup that elevated his profile on and off the pitch.

stories.title: Harper denies giving FanDuel consent for fan video...
stories.summary: Phillies star Bryce Harper said Monday that he did not know how FanDuel would use a personalized video he made for a customer, who has since accused the sportsbook in a lawsuit of taking advantage of his gambling addiction.
